name: Image Converter
description: Convert image files fully in browser.
title: Image Converter
dropHint: Drag and drop image files here or use file picker
notConverted: Press the camera to convert the image.
cameraActionHint: The converted photo will emerge below the camera.
photoDownloadHint: Press the ejected photo to download it.
qualityUnavailable: PNG preserves the image without a quality setting.
conversionError: This image could not be converted.
batchError: Batch conversion could not be completed.
empty: Select or drag an image to start.
